<|file_sep|>README.md
# FastText Multilingual Embeddings

This repository contains pre-trained word embeddings for 157 languages. The embeddings are trained on Wikipedia using [fastText](https://github.com/facebookresearch/fastText).

## Download

You can download the embeddings for each language from the links below.

| Language | Code | Link |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Afrikaans | af | [download](https://dl.fbaipublicfiles.com/fasttext-vectors-wiki/wiki.af.zip) |
